title: Introducing RAM Desktop — A Research Assistant That Works With You
excerpt: RAM Desktop is a macOS research assistant that breaks your question into tasks, collects evidence, and advances the work round by round — pausing at key checkpoints for your review.

title: University Isn't a Job Factory — and Computer Science Isn't Ending
excerpt: Two recurring fears: universities should be industry pipelines, and AI is ending software jobs. I think both framings are wrong — and the reasons why matter.

title: Hello World — Reviving My Personal Site
excerpt: After years of redirecting to Google Sites, I finally rebuilt my homepage from scratch. Here's why and what's next.
